meaning: n.巴拿马(位于中美洲的国家)
examples: The ship was registered in Panama.
He wore a panama hat and a crisp white suit.
The Republic of Panama seceded from Colombia in 1903.
But even Panama has seen its murder rate double in the past four years.
Panama, the richest country in Central America, is relatively safe, drawing travellers to its national parks and beaches.
